item.title: POV: After a true crime documentary
item.description: Suddenly everyone looks a little suspicious after one true crime documentary. Trust issues activated.

media:content.media:title: POV: After a true crime documentary
media:content.media:description: Suddenly everyone looks a little suspicious after one true crime documentary. Trust issues activated.

item.title: POV: The friend who cuts you off
item.description: That one friend who physically cannot let you finish a sentence. A very familiar kind of conversation.

media:content.media:title: POV: The friend who cuts you off
media:content.media:description: That one friend who physically cannot let you finish a sentence. A very familiar kind of conversation.

item.title: POV: My social battery dies mid-hangout
item.description: POV: We’re hanging out and my social battery hits 0% out of nowhere. Suddenly I need to go home immediately.

media:content.media:title: POV: My social battery dies mid-hangout
media:content.media:description: POV: We’re hanging out and my social battery hits 0% out of nowhere. Suddenly I need to go home immediately.

item.title: POV: The friend with no filter
item.description: That one friend who says whatever pops into their head, no matter the moment. A very relatable kind of chaos.

media:content.media:title: POV: The friend with no filter
media:content.media:description: That one friend who says whatever pops into their head, no matter the moment. A very relatable kind of chaos.
